subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the dawn on this Day whereon the Lord of Destiny, the King, hath spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الفجر فی هذا الیوم الذی فیه نطق مالک القدر الملک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
